name: Petro Kenly 95 #395
description: Full-service Petro/TA travel center and East-Coast landmark since 1980 with roughly 350 truck parking spaces, 15 private showers, laundry, barber shop, Iron Skillet restaurant plus quick-serve brands, an on-site truck service center and a certified CAT scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center #6990
description: 24-hour Pilot travel center at the Kenly 95 complex with about 125 truck parking spaces, 9 diesel lanes, 5 reservable showers, laundry, Wi-Fi and a CAT scale.

name: Flying J Travel Center #683
description: Flying J travel plaza with about 145 truck parking spaces, 8 diesel lanes, 9 showers, propane, RV dump station and a CAT scale.

name: Oasis Travel Center (Lakewood Landing)
description: Independent 24-hour travel center with 24-hour diesel (about 2 diesel lanes), roughly 50 truck parking spaces, deli/fast food, convenience store, propane, RV dump and Wi-Fi; no showers reported.

name: Pilot Travel Center #58 (ONE9)
description: 24-hour Pilot/ONE9 travel center at the last NC exit before Virginia with 8 diesel lanes, about 42 truck parking spaces, 4 showers, Subway, ATM, Wi-Fi and a CAT scale.

name: CAT Scale at Kenly 95
description: Certified CAT Scale serving the Kenly 95 Petro/Pilot travel center complex at Exit 106.

name: CAT Scale at Flying J Kenly
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Flying J Travel Center #683, Exit 106.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Pleasant Hill
description: Certified CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #58 / ONE9, Exit 180 near the Virginia line.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Kenly
description: 24/7 Blue Beacon commercial truck and trailer wash at I-95 Exit 106 offering tractor/trailer washes, trailer washouts and protective treatments.

name: Love's Speedco #930
description: Love's Speedco service center at Exit 106 providing commercial truck tires, oil/lube service, light mechanical work and roadside assistance.

name: Kenly 95 Truck Service Center
description: On-site truck service center with ASE-certified mechanics offering new/used truck tires, 24-hour road service, DOT inspections, brake and A/C work at the Kenly 95 travel center.

name: Colony Tire Corporation - Rocky Mount
description: Commercial and fleet tire and truck repair shop near the Rocky Mount I-95 exits offering commercial tires, service and mechanical repair.

name: Halifax County I-95 Weigh Station (SHP)
description: NC State Highway Patrol fixed truck inspection/weigh station near mile marker 151 in Halifax County (both directions, about 18 miles south of Roanoke Rapids), with four fixed scales.

name: I-95 Johnston County Rest Area (MM 99)
description: NCDOT rest area on I-95 at mile marker 99 (both directions), about 2 miles north of Selma, with restrooms, vending and car/truck parking.

name: I-95 Nash County Rest Area (MM 142)
description: NCDOT rest area on I-95 at mile marker 142 (both directions), about 1.5 miles north of Dortches near Rocky Mount/Battleboro, with restrooms and truck/car parking.

name: North Carolina Welcome Center - I-95 Northampton
description: NC Welcome Center on southbound I-95 at mile marker 181 in Northampton County, about a half mile south of the Virginia line near Pleasant Hill; travel information, restrooms and car/truck parking.

name: Rocky Mount Inn
description: Budget motel near I-95 (the marketed I-95 halfway point) with ample parking for trucks, buses and RVs, guest laundry, Wi-Fi and pet-friendly rooms.

name: Mangum's Towing & Road Service (Rocky Mount)
description: Heavy-duty semi-truck towing, recovery and mobile road service (tires, mechanical, jump starts) dispatched along I-95 from bases including Wilson, Rocky Mount and Roanoke Rapids.

name: Coastal Towing (Coastal Wrecker)
description: Heavy-duty and semi-truck towing, recovery and emergency roadside assistance serving the Rocky Mount, Kenly and Roanoke Rapids stretch of I-95.

name: Central Carolina Diesel Repair
description: Heavy-duty truck and trailer repair shop in the Kenly area offering roadside service and towing along the I-95 corridor.

name: SAGE Truck Driving School at Nash Community College
description: CDL Class A/B training program (ELDT-aligned, manual and automatic trucks plus simulator) delivered with Nash Community College near I-95 in Rocky Mount.

name: Johnston Community College CDL Driver Training
description: Community college CDL driver training program near the I-95/I-40 corridor in Smithfield.
